## How it was tested

- [ ] `ruff check .`
- [ ] `mypy`

## Checklist

- [ ] New/changed adapter has a test file in `tests/`
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] README adapter table updated (for new adapters)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
